note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Venous Left lower leg measures aprx 1.6 x 3.3cm, depth 0.7cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 1.0x2.0, 0.3cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left lower leg wound site, rates 8/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Venous venous Left lower leg measures 1.6 cm x 3.3 cm x 0.7 cm.
  Wound bed: 61% slough, 39% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Venous venous Left lower leg — not improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Nutritional consult ordered.
